seo.title: AMG Connect
seo.description: AMG Connect is the role-based portal for approved owners, crews, partners, and administrators.

hero.headline: One support view for approved stakeholders.
hero.body: AMG Connect gives approved stakeholders role-based visibility into support activity without replacing operational approval or final support acceptance.

portalPreview.headline: The support picture, in one portal.
portalPreview.body: Approved owners, crews, partners, and administrators see the request, document, message, quote, invoice, and status context their role requires.
